name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Canned - Beef Chunks in Gravy 400g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Full-balanced, beef protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Bonnie Beef Adult Cat Canned Food , fully balanced, beef protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 7.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4.0 Crude Fiber (%) -0.5 Moisture (%) - 81 Crude Ash (%) - 2.05 Vitamin A (Min) -1400 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) -180 IE/kg Iron -8 mg/kg Copper -1.2 mg/kg Iodine -0.21 mg/kg Manganese -1.6 mg/kg Zinc -8.0 mg/kg Selenium -0.02 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and Animal Derivatives (Beef 4% min., Liver 4% min.), Cereals, Fish and Fish Derivatives, Minerals,Colourants, Preservatives. MINERALS: Iron, Copper, Iodine, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium VITAMINS: Vit.A,Vit. D3
